prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is PEX & copper installation, part of the Piping & Plumbing scope. The observed field condition is: crimp ring fails go/no-go gauge. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IPC, mfr specs.
title: Compliance check: PEX & copper installation (commercial project)
